home.subtitle: ShieldNet helps victims of online harassment document evidence, generate official complaints, and track their case — without ever revealing who they are.

report.title: Report an incident
report.subtitle: No account needed. Your identity is never recorded.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Share as much or as little detail as you're comfortable with...
report.validationError: Please fill in all fields before submitting.
report.successSub: Save this token — you'll need it to track your case status. We never link this token to your identity.
report.successNote: Status updates will appear on the Track Case page.

track.title: Track your case
track.subtitle: Enter the token you received when you submitted your report.

analytics.title: Cyber harassment trends
analytics.subtitle: Anonymized statistics from reports submitted through ShieldNet. No personal data is ever displayed here.

footer.tagline: Protecting victims. Exposing abusers. Connecting the world.
